goal: This case-file codebase has accumulated correctness/robustness risks (src/features/case-file status aggregation, src/lib/format.ts edge cases). As the Solution Architect, identify the single highest-priority correctness defect grounded in the actual code; then the team must IMPLEMENT the fix production-ready with a regression test (engineer writes it). Prioritize stability; verify existing rendering is preserved.
acceptance_hint: A real grounded stabilization fix + regression test, implemented by the engineer, suite/typecheck green.
